title: Product Photo White Sketch Overlay AI
sourceTitle: Product Photo White Sketch Overlay AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Clean minimal studio product photo of matte ceramic fragrance diffuser shaped like a small rounded pebble, with a tiny white-line cartoon gardener gently watering the diffuser as if it were a plant drawn in white lines interacting with the real product. Subject: matte ceramic fragrance diffuser shaped like a small rounded pebble is arranged in a fun conceptual pose as the real photographed hero object; a tiny white-line cartoon gardener gently watering the diffuser as if it were a plant reaches into the photo and interacts with it without covering the product identity. Scene: Warm beige wall and minimal studio surface with soft side light casting long shadows across the background. Composition: Fixed square 1:1 editorial product-ad composition: product placed slightly off-center, hand-drawn white sketch overlay aligned to the object, ample negative space, and shallow depth of field. Signature Elements: Preserved product photo white sketch overlay source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Photorealistic premium editorial brand campaign blending actual product photography with simple hand-drawn cartoon sketch illustration, clean minimal staging, and high-end creative-ad polish. Color Palette: Fixed warm beige wall, soft neutral shadows, white line-art overlay, natural product color, and restrained premium studio tones. Lighting: Soft side light with long realistic shadows, gentle product highlights, and clean depth without harsh glare. Camera: Square studio product camera with shallow depth of field, crisp product surface detail, and believable overlay registration. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
